pundit.name: Eric Wynalda
pundit.take: **Mustard Boy Zach's dominance is as inevitable as Brazil stomping Ghost Pepper Devin's fantasy hopes into oblivion.** Let's be honest: Devin must've drafted with a randomizer or picked countries he recognized from his FIFA video game days. Spain may have been a decent first-round pick, but expecting Haiti to do anything against Brazil is laughable. Meanwhile, Zach sits comfortably at the top, and when you draft Brazil, it's not a question of winning — it's a question of how many. Look, the kid Rafe, also known as "The Noisemaker," is hot on Zach's heels with a bit of luck and chaos, but even he stands a better chance than Devin's misguided strategy. Brazil versus Haiti is not just a match; it's a massacre waiting to happen. There's no defense, Devin — your roster is a joke, and Mustard Boy will show you how easily you fold.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's Canada Delivers Humbling 6-0 Defeat to Qatar
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner claims it was all part of his underdog strategy.

pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin hopes USA can match Canada's massive win against Qatar.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Faces Off Against Ghost Pepper in Brazil vs Haiti
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach confident Brazil won't get lost in Devin's spicy roster.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin Looks to Redeem After Korea Loss to Mexico
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden trusts Turkey to avoid becoming another tactical misfire.

rome_analytics_quotes: Zach sits on top, but his 19% win chance is as fragile as glass.
Gunner's Tier-2 lineup isn't delivering: Senegal got zero points, that's brutal.
Devin should be Rafe's punching bag with that -6 point differential nightmare.
The sim backed Gunner, but Rafe's chaos crashed their party, what a shock!
